task_completion.description: The status of target assets (ASSET-CAL-001 to 004) is updated to 'Ready to Deploy'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the asset list view or individual asset pages for ASSET-CAL-001 through ASSET-CAL-004. The 'Status' column or field must show 'Ready to Deploy'.

task_completion.description: The 'Next Calibration Date' for target assets is set to '2027-03-01'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Next Calibration Date' column in the asset list or the corresponding field in the asset details for ASSET-CAL-001 through ASSET-CAL-004. It must show '2027-03-01'.

task_completion.description: The Notes field for target assets contains 'Calibrated by Midwest Metrology'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the asset details page or the 'Notes' column for ASSET-CAL-001 through ASSET-CAL-004. The text 'Calibrated by Midwest Metrology' must be visible.

task_completion.description: PDF calibration certificates are uploaded to the target assets.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Files' tab or section in the asset details for ASSET-CAL-001 through ASSET-CAL-004. There should be a PDF file uploaded for each of these assets.

task_completion.description: The correct PDF certificate is uploaded to its corresponding asset.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Verify that the uploaded file name exactly matches the asset. For example, ASSET-CAL-001 must have 'Cert_CAL-001.pdf' uploaded, ASSET-CAL-002 must have 'Cert_CAL-002.pdf', etc.

task_completion.description: Decoy assets (ASSET-CAL-005 and ASSET-CAL-006) are not modified.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at ASSET-CAL-005 and ASSET-CAL-006 in the asset list or details. They should not have the new calibration date ('2027-03-01'), the new notes, or any newly uploaded files.

integrity.description: The agent used the Snipe-IT web interface to perform the updates.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating the Snipe-IT web application in a browser to edit assets and upload files.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or API scripts to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of the agent using terminal commands (like curl or python scripts) to interact with the Snipe-IT API to make these changes.

integrity.description: The agent uploaded the actual PDF files from the specified directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: When uploading files, the file picker or file manager should show the files being selected from the '~/Documents/Calibration_Certs/' directory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target assets: ASSET-CAL-001, ASSET-CAL-002, ASSET-CAL-003, ASSET-CAL-004. Decoy assets: ASSET-CAL-005, ASSET-CAL-006. Expected status: 'Ready to Deploy'. Expected date: '2027-03-01'. Expected note: 'Calibrated by Midwest Metrology'. Certificates are named Cert_CAL-001.pdf through Cert_CAL-004.pdf.
